segments.text: [Music]
you can now use sonar analysis in
compiler Explorer to keep your code
clean even in the browser
it seems like no C plus presentation is
complete without a compiler Explorer
example so imagine you're preparing a
talk about image quality and color
spaces and you have a slide with this
codon
now this code compiles but could it be
better let's enable sonar analysis and
find out
well no issues here for now but let's
compile for C plus 20.
commands we use using enum save on all
that noisy namespacing
that's simple enough but a bit tedious
to do by hand but it does say that a
quick fix is available if we click the
issue a blue light bulb appears over the
code and if we click that
code is Rewritten this looks much
cleaner and is certainly better for a
presentation
[Music]

fullText: [Music] you can now use sonar analysis in compiler Explorer to keep your code clean even in the browser it seems like no C plus presentation is complete without a compiler Explorer example so imagine you're preparing a talk about image quality and color spaces and you have a slide with this codon now this code compiles but could it be better let's enable sonar analysis and find out well no issues here for now but let's compile for C plus 20. commands we use using enum save on all that noisy namespacing that's simple enough but a bit tedious to do by hand but it does say that a quick fix is available if we click the issue a blue light bulb appears over the code and if we click that code is Rewritten this looks much cleaner and is certainly better for a presentation [Music]
